cards.name: Sephiroth, One-Winged Angel
cards.reason: Massive flyer that destroys a creature on ETB and has a powerful Flashback board wipe.

cards.name: Cloud Strife
cards.reason: Becomes indestructible when equipped and deals excess damage to the opponent; ultimate finisher.

cards.name: Bahamut, King of Dragons
cards.reason: High-cost flyer that deals 5 damage to all non-dragon creatures when it enters.

cards.name: Aerith, Ancient Protector
cards.reason: Provides Ward to your team and can sacrifice itself to give Indestructible at instant speed.

cards.name: Ultima Weapon
cards.reason: Power and toughness equal to your life total; can end the game in a single swing.

cards.name: Chocobo Rider
cards.reason: Solid Landfall enabler that grows and provides mana fixing.

cards.name: Black Mage Barrage
cards.reason: Efficient burn spell that rewards you for casting non-creature spells.

cards.name: Cid's Engineering
cards.reason: Creates two artifact tokens that can be sacrificed for value or to crew Vehicles.

cards.name: Phoenix Down
cards.reason: The premier reanimation spell for small creatures in white.

cards.name: Moogle Messenger
cards.reason: Cheap flyer that loots cards into the graveyard for Flashback strategies.

tiers.label: Good Playables
tiers.description: Solid cards that make every deck better

cards.name: Warrior of Light
cards.reason: Reliable 2-drop that creates a Wizard token to help go-wide strategies.

cards.name: Mana Potion
cards.reason: Standard ramp artifact that can be sacrificed late-game to draw a card.

cards.name: Firaga
cards.reason: Flexible removal spell that can hit creatures or planeswalkers.

cards.name: Esuna
cards.reason: Efficient protection spell that removes -1/-1 counters or Auras from your creatures.

cards.name: Cactuar Scout
cards.reason: Provides Haste and Deathtouch; trades up effectively against bombs.

cards.name: Midgar City
cards.reason: Utility land that provides colorless mana and a minor late-game benefit.

cards.name: Iron Giant
cards.reason: Big blocker but too slow for aggressive decks.

cards.name: Steal
cards.reason: Conditional bounce or artifact theft; very situational.

tiers.label: Sideboard / Avoid
tiers.description: Only play if desperate or as sideboard cards

cards.name: Tent
cards.reason: Provides minor lifegain and land search; too slow for Limited.

cards.name: Broken Materia
cards.reason: Artifact that provides zero value unless you have very specific synergies.

tiers.label: Unplayable
tiers.description: Never put these in your deck

cards.name: Gilgamesh's Trash
cards.reason: Overcosted discard effect that doesn't affect the board.
